seo_h1: Phillis of Delos on Music and Chronology

seo.browser_title: Phillis of Delos on Eulogikon Greek Archive and Library
seo.meta_title: Classical Phillis of Delos Ancient Greek Historical Works
seo.meta_description: Phillis of Delos was a Hellenistic historian. Her surviving historical works are preserved. Free to read and download from the Greek library archive.

biography_html:
Phillis of Delos is identified as a historian of the 4th–3rd century BCE Hellenistic period. No biographical details survive. The attribution of a female historian from this era is exceptionally rare in the extant record. Her association with Delos places her at a significant religious and commercial center in the Aegean.

A single prose work in the Koine dialect is attributed to Phillis, but its title is unknown. No major scholarly reference work contains an entry or mention of this historian.

The complete absence from standard reference sources precludes any assessment of historical significance or influence. The attribution may derive from a minor or fragmentary source not covered by these resources.
